postReview.title: Sunderland 0-1 Brighton: Minteh's slice seals away win at Stadium of Light
postReview.description: Brighton leapfrogged Sunderland in the Premier League as Yankuba Minteh proved to be the match-winner at the Stadium of Light.

postReview.title: Sunderland 0-1 Brighton: Minteh decide con un centrochut defectuoso y sella el triunfo en el Stadium of Light
postReview.description: El Brighton se impuso al Sunderland en la Premier League con Yankuba Minteh como héroe del partido en el Stadium of Light.

postReview.title: Sunderland-Brighton 0-1: Minteh decide di misura allo Stadium of Light
postReview.description: Il Brighton ha superato il Sunderland in Premier League: decisivo Yankuba Minteh allo Stadium of Light.

postReview.title: Sunderland 0-1 Brighton: desvio de Minteh garante vitória fora de casa no Stadium of Light
postReview.description: O Brighton passou o Sunderland na Premier League, com Yankuba Minteh decidindo a partida no Stadium of Light.

postReview.title: Sunderland 0-1 Brighton : un centre-tir dévissé de Minteh offre la victoire à l'extérieur au Stadium of Light
postReview.description: Brighton a dépassé Sunderland en Premier League, Yankuba Minteh se montrant décisif au Stadium of Light.

postReview.title: Sunderland 0:1 Brighton: Mintehs abgefälschte Hereingabe entscheidet Auswärtssieg im Stadium of Light
postReview.description: Brighton zog in der Premier League an Sunderland vorbei, weil Yankuba Minteh im Stadium of Light den Unterschied machte.

postReview.title: سندرلاند 0-1 برايتون: لمسة مينتيه تحسم الفوز خارج الديار في ملعب النور
postReview.description: تقدم برايتون على سندرلاند في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز بعدما حسم يانكوبا مينتيه المباراة في ملعب النور.

postReview.title: Sunderland 0-1 Brighton: desvio de Minteh garante triunfo fora no Stadium of Light
postReview.description: O Brighton venceu o Sunderland na Premier League, com Yankuba Minteh a decidir no Stadium of Light.

preReview.title: Sunderland must stay humble after reaching 40-point mark, says Xhaka
preReview.description: Sunderland have outperformed all expectations this season, but captain Granit Xhaka does not want them to get carried away.

preReview.title: Xhaka avisa: Sunderland debe mantener los pies en el suelo tras alcanzar los 40 puntos
preReview.description: El Sunderland ha superado todas las expectativas esta temporada, pero su capitán, Granit Xhaka, no quiere que el equipo se venga arriba.

preReview.title: Xhaka: «Sunderland, umiltà anche dopo quota 40 punti»
preReview.description: Il Sunderland sta andando oltre ogni aspettativa in questa stagione, ma il capitano Granit Xhaka non vuole che la squadra si esalti.

preReview.title: Sunderland precisa manter os pés no chão após chegar aos 40 pontos, diz Xhaka
preReview.description: Sunderland superou todas as expectativas nesta temporada, mas o capitão Granit Xhaka não quer ver o time se empolgar.

preReview.title: Sunderland doit rester humble après avoir atteint la barre des 40 points, selon Xhaka
preReview.description: Sunderland dépasse toutes les attentes cette saison, mais son capitaine, Granit Xhaka, ne veut pas voir l'équipe s'emballer.

preReview.title: Sunderland muss nach der 40-Punkte-Marke demütig bleiben, sagt Xhaka
preReview.description: Sunderland hat in dieser Saison alle Erwartungen übertroffen, doch Kapitän Granit Xhaka will nicht, dass die Mannschaft abhebt.

preReview.title: تشاكا: على سندرلاند التزام التواضع بعد الوصول إلى حاجز 40 نقطة
preReview.description: سندرلاند فاجأ الجميع هذا الموسم، لكن قائده جرانيت تشاكا يطالب الفريق بعدم الانجراف خلف الحماس.

preReview.title: Sunderland tem de manter a humildade após chegar aos 40 pontos, diz Xhaka
preReview.description: Sunderland supera todas as expectativas esta época, mas o capitão Granit Xhaka não quer que a equipa se deixe embalar.

QAData.answer: Brighton & Hove Albion won 1–0 over Sunderland on Sat, 14 Mar 2026 15:00:00 GMT.
